race_meta.race_name: Bet £10 Get £40 With BetMGM Fillies' Novice Stakes (GBB Race)

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model placed champonie at position 2 (24.0% probability) vs top pick Welcome Retreat (26.0%). Underestimated winning horse by ~2.0 percentage points.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Welcome Retreat > Champonie, but actual result was Champonie > Paradise Walk (IRE). Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Champonie showed negative divergence (-12.4%): Model overvalued at 24.0% vs Market 36.4%. Market sentiment more accurate than model.
